name: tranche-c
description: FB tranche C — questions with both Grok (xAI.1) and Foresight (LightningRodLabs.1) submissions on 2026-03-29 and 2026-04-12. Built 2026-04-30 to extend the Grok / Foresight overlap beyond tranche-A's n=423 / n=418 paired comparisons.
notes: Inclusion criterion: question is in the xAI.1 forecast set on the date AND has resolved=true in the FB cache AND has a question file under data/questions/{src}/{qid}.json. The market overlap (65) is small relative to tranche-AB (200) because many markets on these dates have not yet resolved; the dataset overlap (389) is large since FB dataset questions resolve on a fixed cadence. Most power gain on combined tranche-ABC is on the data column.
